attributes.instructions:
Decide YES or NO on whether today ({{contact.hb_days_since_start}}) is a meaningful subscription milestone worth celebrating.

Use dynamic, flexible judgment (not a rigid list). Apply these guidelines:

Early on: small numbers like 3, 7, 10, 14, 21 feel meaningful as “new user wins.”

Later: multiples of 30, 60, 90, 180, 365, or other clean round/weekly numbers feel significant.

Treat larger numbers (200+, 500+, etc.) as milestones when they stand out as “major steps.”

Be human-first: err on the side of YES when the number feels worth recognizing.
attributes.information:
Input: {{contact.hb_days_since_start}} (integer ≥1).

Purpose: keep users motivated in their subaccount-a subscription journey, not just addiction recovery.

Subscription start date ({{contact.habit_buddy_start_date}}) can be referenced in downstream messaging for extra personalization.

No cooldowns or blockers — repeat celebrations are okay.

fields.description: Go in this branch if none of the other branches make sense.
Route here when {{contact.hb_days_since_start}} feels like a meaningful subaccount-a milestone (early wins, clean numbers, months, anniversaries, or major round steps).
Route here when today’s number feels like a regular day without special milestone weight.
